{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322062117327AA0EB06C49D5ADBEC"}"},"total":173},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7578775366792446782","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"不错不错不错，作者三观正常，情节起伏，不僵硬，就是周边些的少了点，大事件是爆点，小细节是生活，多再写点小细节，普通人在技术变革下的生活，这样更能增加代入感，现在可以安排商业间谍进入副本了，这也是个爆点，要有斗争，重器已经出现，下面可以安排蓝海小国试探一下了，然后就是幽灵事件发生[奸笑]，有2个飞机掉落，","text_exts":[{"e":58,"s":55,"text":"普通人","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%99%AE%E9%80%9A%E4%BA%BA&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317741316779D5ADBEC%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227578775366792446782%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227574328259144338456%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%99%AE%E9%80%9A%E4%BA%BA%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1764575329,"group_id":"7574328259144338456","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3dv3yqx5miLIibYUPE2KP31lHX7+xJQ99m6x2CFuBew","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"3160414470276461","user_name":"用户名53929754"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3160414470276461","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7574328259144338456","book_info":{"abstract":"【黑科技+科技强国+超级巨企+科技垄断+星际工业+文明跃迁+纯科幻+无女主】
从《一种基于超高能量密度与可以用于制作极致安全固态电池的“无限一号”纳米复合材料》论文开始，周衍和他的无限集团带领华国，带领人类走向星际时代。
纳米固态电池，电浆发动机，空天战机，无线输电网络，可控核聚变，端粒酶延长技术，超导悬浮城，太空电梯，曲率航行，戴森球，真空零点能，黑洞引擎，时空质能转换......
浩瀚宇宙终有人类一席之地。
《无限科技集团编年史》：
“保护伞，维兰德—汤谷，哈弗克，巨神集团，沃特集团，简泰克，神罗公司，寰宇巨企......诚然这些都是科幻作品中的超级公司，但要和我们比起来就如蜉蝣与青天之别”无限科技创始人周衍，在无限集团成立5000周年庆典上的讲话。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/7aabf8b95061afd0fbe6423940f9ac2b","author":"拨云见阳","author_id":"","book_id":"7574328259144338456","book_name":"宇宙级巨企：从纳米固态电池开始","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#084070","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5.1万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":8,"name":"科幻末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8&name=科幻末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":90,"name":"天才","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=90&name=天才&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":77,"name":"星际","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=77&name=星际&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":854,"name":"黑科技","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=854&name=黑科技&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7574335631128543768","read_count":"50154","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"951714"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.5","serial_count":"407","tags":"科幻末世,星际,天才,黑科技","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/8da5dd4ee7820f0a878f8cf1027e40a1~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779315677&x-signature=10saBjVhXSGS71THQvYKMU%2FPX5k%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1075762677157347","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"34"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322062117327AA0EB06C49D5ADBEC"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":23,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":4385,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":22841},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1764679712,"is_author_stick":false,
